responses: Hello! How can I help you discover EFREI today?
Hi there! Do you have any questions about our programs or campus?

We offer an Engineering Program, various Bachelors, and Specialized Master's degrees. You can check out the 'Courses' tab for detailed tracks like Data Science, Cybersecurity, or Software Engineering!
You can find us at Campus République, 30-32 Av. de la République, 94800 Villejuif. Feel free to use the form on the 'Contact' page to reach specific departments like IT Support or Student Services!

Admissions depend on your current academic level. We accept post-high school applications as well as parallel admissions. Please reach out to our admissions team via the contact form for specific requirements.
EFREI has a vibrant student life with dozens of associations, including tech clubs, sports teams, and arts societies. Our campus also features state-of-the-art labs and a great environment to thrive!

Yes! Many of our programs, including the Engineering cycle and Master's degrees, can be completed as an apprenticeship (work-study). We maintain strong partnerships with top tech companies to help you launch your career.
EFREI is a top-tier generalist digital engineering school. Our mission is to shape engineers' minds for the future through cutting-edge technologies and boundless expertise.
You're very welcome! Have a great day and we hope to see you at EFREI soon!
Goodbye! Don't hesitate to ask if you need anything else.
